requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and IEC 63056 as the International Baseline for Cape Verde BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619和IEC 63056作为佛得角BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619和IEC 63056作為維德角BESS項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: Cape Verde's standards body, IGQPI (Instituto de Gestão da Qualidade e da Propriedade Intelectual), is the national conformity and metrology authority. IGQPI administers product conformity marking and adopts IEC international standards as the technical reference framework, consistent with Cape Verde's Portuguese regulatory heritage and alignment with EU/ECOWAS technical norms. For BESS cell and module safety, IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected standard referenced in ARME grid-connection agreements and ELECTRA project specifications. IEC 63056:2020 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements) extends safety requirements specifically to cells and batteries used in stationary energy storage, and is expected to be referenced alongside IEC 62619 for grid-scale BESS in Cape Verde. Chinese GB 38031 (for EV batteries) and GB/T 36276 (for stationary BESS) are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 or IEC 63056 in Cape Verde project or IGQPI conformity review.
summary.zh: 佛得角标准机构IGQPI（质量与知识产权管理研究所）是国家合格评定和计量主管机构。IGQPI管理产品合格标志并采用IEC国际标准作为技术参考框架，符合佛得角葡萄牙监管遗产及与欧盟/西共体技术规范的对接。对于BESS电芯和模组安全，IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是ARME并网协议和ELECTRA项目规格中引用的国际预期标准。IEC 63056:2020（固定式储能系统用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）将安全要求专门延伸至固定式储能中使用的电芯和电池，预计与IEC 62619一起在佛得角电网规模BESS中被引用。中国GB 38031（用于电动汽车电池）和GB/T 36276（用于固定式BESS）不被佛得角项目或IGQPI合格评定审查接受为IEC 62619或IEC 63056的等效依据。
summary.zht: 維德角標準機構IGQPI（質量與知識產權管理研究所）是國家合格評定和計量主管機構。IGQPI管理產品合格標誌並採用IEC國際標準作為技術參考框架，符合維德角葡萄牙監管遺產及與歐盟/西共體技術規範的對接。對於BESS電芯和模組安全，IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是ARME併網協議和ELECTRA項目規格中引用的國際預期標準。IEC 63056:2020（固定式儲能系統用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）將安全要求專門延伸至固定式儲能中使用的電芯和電池，預計與IEC 62619一起在維德角電網規模BESS中被引用。中國GB 38031（用於電動汽車電池）和GB/T 36276（用於固定式BESS）不被維德角項目或IGQPI合格評定審查接受為IEC 62619或IEC 63056的等效依據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Cape Verde project specifications)
IEC 63056:2020 — Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements (stationary BESS specific; expected to be referenced alongside IEC 62619)
IGQPI — Instituto de Gestão da Qualidade e da Propriedade Intelectual (Cape Verde national standards and conformity authority; verify current conformity mark requirements directly)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for large-format BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which applies to BESS over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters in stationary EES. GB 38031 (Safety Requirements for Traction Battery of Electric Vehicle) applies to EV batteries and is sometimes incorrectly proposed as a substitute for stationary BESS safety evidence — it is not applicable. None of GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, or GB 38031 are accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 or IEC 63056 in Cape Verde project specifications or IGQPI review. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 and IEC 63056 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国大型BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），适用于100 kWh以上的BESS。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为固定式EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。GB 38031（电动汽车用动力电池安全要求）适用于电动汽车电池，有时被错误地提议作为固定式BESS安全证据的替代依据——实际上并不适用。GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB 38031均不被佛得角项目规格或IGQPI审查接受为IEC 62619或IEC 63056的等效依据。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619和IEC 63056型式试验证据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國大型BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），適用於100 kWh以上的BESS。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為固定式EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。GB 38031（電動汽車用動力電池安全要求）適用於電動汽車電池，有時被錯誤地提議作為固定式BESS安全證據的替代依據——實際上並不適用。GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB 38031均不被維德角項目規格或IGQPI審查接受為IEC 62619或IEC 63056的等效依據。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619和IEC 63056型式試驗證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in EES — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary)
GB 38031-2020 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求 (Safety Requirements for Traction Battery of Electric Vehicle; EV scope only — not applicable to stationary BESS)

gap.en: Critical gap: Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 or IEC 63056 and are not accepted as substitutes in Cape Verde project specifications or IGQPI conformity review. Exporters must: (a) verify the current IGQPI conformity mark requirements for imported BESS cells and modules directly with IGQPI before shipment; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for all cells and modules supplied to Cape Verde BESS projects; (c) obtain IEC 63056 safety test evidence for the complete battery system used in stationary EES application; (d) confirm with ARME and ELECTRA which edition of IEC 62619 and IEC 63056 is referenced in the applicable project specification or grid-connection agreement; (e) note that GB 38031 is an EV battery standard and must not be proposed as stationary BESS safety evidence for Cape Verde.
gap.zh: 关键差距：中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619或IEC 63056协调，不被佛得角项目规格或IGQPI合格评定审查接受为替代依据。出口商须：（a）出货前直接向IGQPI核实进口BESS电芯和模组的现行IGQPI合格标志要求；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至佛得角BESS项目的所有电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）取得固定式EES应用中使用的完整电池系统的IEC 63056安全测试证据；（d）向ARME和ELECTRA确认适用项目规格或并网协议中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 63056版本；（e）注意GB 38031是电动汽车电池标准，不得作为佛得角固定式BESS安全证据提出。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619或IEC 63056協調，不被維德角項目規格或IGQPI合格評定審查接受為替代依據。出口商須：（a）出貨前直接向IGQPI核實進口BESS電芯和模組的現行IGQPI合格標誌要求；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至維德角BESS項目的所有電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）取得固定式EES應用中使用的完整電池系統的IEC 63056安全測試證據；（d）向ARME和ELECTRA確認適用項目規格或併網協議中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 63056版本；（e）注意GB 38031是電動汽車電池標準，不得作為維德角固定式BESS安全證據提出。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where ARME, ELECTRA, or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 and IEC 63056 compliance; verify current IGQPI mandatory conformity mark scope directly with IGQPI
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard for BESS cells over 100 kWh (effective August 2025); GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; GB 38031 applies to EV batteries only; none are accepted as IEC 62619 equivalents in Cape Verde

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Cape Verde BESS project acceptance. IEC 62619 cell/module safety evidence and IEC 63056 stationary EES battery safety evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory are the internationally expected requirements. Verify the current IGQPI conformity mark scope and confirm IEC evidence requirements with ARME, ELECTRA, and the project owner before shipment. Do not propose GB 38031 (EV standard) as a substitute for stationary BESS safety evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足佛得角BESS项目验收要求。来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62619电芯/模组安全证据和IEC 63056固定式EES电池安全证据是国际预期要求。出货前核实现行IGQPI合格标志范围，并向ARME、ELECTRA和项目业主确认IEC证据要求。不得将GB 38031（电动汽车标准）作为固定式BESS安全证据的替代依据提出。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足維德角BESS項目驗收要求。來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62619電芯/模組安全證據和IEC 63056固定式EES電池安全證據是國際預期要求。出貨前核實現行IGQPI合格標誌範圍，並向ARME、ELECTRA和項目業主確認IEC證據要求。不得將GB 38031（電動汽車標準）作為固定式BESS安全證據的替代依據提出。

requirement_topic.en: BMS Requirements and Thermal Management in Tropical Coastal Conditions — IEC 62933-5-2 and Coastal Environmental Qualification
requirement_topic.zh: BMS要求及热带沿海条件下的热管理——IEC 62933-5-2及沿海环境鉴定
requirement_topic.zht: BMS要求及熱帶沿海條件下的熱管理——IEC 62933-5-2及沿海環境鑒定

summary.en: Battery Management System (BMS) requirements for Cape Verde BESS installations are expected to align with IEC 62933-5-2 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based energy storage systems) and any project-specific ARME or ELECTRA safety specifications. Cape Verde's tropical coastal climate — sustained ambient temperatures of 20–32°C year-round, relative humidity consistently above 85% in coastal zones, and direct salt-mist exposure across all nine inhabited islands — imposes continuous corrosive and thermal stress on BMS electronics, cell monitoring systems, and thermal management infrastructure. BESS thermal management systems designed and validated for Chinese standard laboratory conditions (typically 25°C, low humidity, non-coastal) must be re-evaluated and tested for Cape Verde's sustained tropical coastal operating conditions. Failure of BMS or thermal management under Cape Verde's environmental conditions could result in thermal runaway events in island locations with limited emergency response capacity.
summary.zh: 佛得角BESS装置的电池管理系统（BMS）要求预计须与IEC 62933-5-2（储能系统——电化学储能系统安全要求）及ARME或ELECTRA的任何项目专属安全规格对标。佛得角热带沿海气候——全年持续20–32°C环境温度、沿海地带相对湿度持续高于85%、九个有人居住的岛屿全部直接暴露于盐雾——对BMS电子元器件、电芯监控系统和热管理基础设施持续施加腐蚀和热应力。针对中国标准实验室条件（通常为25°C、低湿度、非沿海）设计和验证的BESS热管理系统，须针对佛得角持续热带沿海运行条件重新评估和测试。BMS或热管理在佛得角环境条件下失效，可能在应急响应能力有限的岛屿地点导致热失控事件。
summary.zht: 維德角BESS裝置的電池管理系統（BMS）要求預計須與IEC 62933-5-2（儲能系統——電化學儲能系統安全要求）及ARME或ELECTRA的任何項目專屬安全規格對標。維德角熱帶沿海氣候——全年持續20–32°C環境溫度、沿海地帶相對濕度持續高於85%、九個有人居住的島嶼全部直接暴露於鹽霧——對BMS電子元器件、電芯監控系統和熱管理基礎設施持續施加腐蝕和熱應力。針對中國標準實驗室條件（通常為25°C、低濕度、非沿海）設計和驗證的BESS熱管理系統，須針對維德角持續熱帶沿海運行條件重新評估和測試。BMS或熱管理在維德角環境條件下失效，可能在應急響應能力有限的島嶼地點導致熱失控事件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (BMS and system-level safety baseline expected by ARME/ELECTRA)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation
IEC 60068-2-52 — Environmental Testing — Salt Mist Cyclic (Sodium Chloride Solution) — applicable to BMS and thermal management equipment in coastal Cape Verde installations
IEC 60068-2-78 — Environmental Testing — Damp Heat Steady State — applicable to BMS electronics in high-humidity tropical coastal environments

summary.en: China's BESS BMS requirements are governed by GB/T 34131-2023 (Technical Requirements for Battery Management System of Electrical Energy Storage System) and GB/T 36276-2023 (cell and cluster performance). These standards define BMS functional requirements for grid-connected BESS under Chinese grid and ambient conditions but do not include tropical coastal salt-mist or sustained high-humidity environmental qualification. Chinese GB thermal management validation is conducted under standard laboratory ambient conditions. GB/T 34131 is not accepted as equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2 in Cape Verde project specifications. Exporters must assess whether BMS hardware, sensors, and communication interfaces have been validated for Cape Verde's sustained 20–32°C at >85% RH with direct salt-mist exposure, and must supply IEC 62933-5-2 evidence and relevant IEC 60068 environmental test reports.
summary.zh: 中国BESS BMS要求由GB/T 34131-2023（电化学储能系统用电池管理系统技术条件）和GB/T 36276-2023（电芯和电池簇性能）管控。这些标准在中国电网和环境条件下定义了并网BESS的BMS功能要求，但不包含热带沿海盐雾或持续高湿度环境鉴定。中国GB热管理验证在标准实验室环境条件下进行。GB/T 34131不被佛得角项目规格接受为IEC 62933-5-2的等效依据。出口商须评估BMS硬件、传感器和通信接口是否已针对佛得角持续20–32°C、>85%相对湿度和直接盐雾暴露进行验证，并须提供IEC 62933-5-2证据和相关IEC 60068环境测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國BESS BMS要求由GB/T 34131-2023（電化學儲能系統用電池管理系統技術條件）和GB/T 36276-2023（電芯和電池簇性能）管控。這些標準在中國電網和環境條件下定義了併網BESS的BMS功能要求，但不包含熱帶沿海鹽霧或持續高濕度環境鑒定。中國GB熱管理驗證在標準實驗室環境條件下進行。GB/T 34131不被維德角項目規格接受為IEC 62933-5-2的等效依據。出口商須評估BMS硬件、傳感器和通訊接口是否已針對維德角持續20–32°C、>85%相對濕度和直接鹽霧暴露進行驗證，並須提供IEC 62933-5-2證據和相關IEC 60068環境測試報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34131-2023 — 电化学储能系统用电池管理系统技术条件 (Technical Requirements for Battery Management System of Electrical Energy Storage System; not accepted as equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2 in Cape Verde)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary; standard lab conditions only)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T 34131 BMS certification is not accepted as equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2 in Cape Verde. Critical environmental qualification gaps: (a) salt-mist qualification — IEC 60068-2-52 cyclic salt mist testing is expected for all BMS and thermal management equipment installed in Cape Verde's Atlantic island coastal locations but is not required under Chinese GB standards; (b) damp heat qualification — IEC 60068-2-78 steady-state damp heat testing at 40°C/93% RH is expected to demonstrate resilience of BMS electronics under Cape Verde's tropical coastal humidity; (c) thermal management derating — BMS thermal management designed for 25°C standard ambient may not maintain safe operating temperature ranges under Cape Verde's sustained 20–32°C ambient with high solar irradiance in containerised outdoor BESS; (d) IEC 62933-5-2 system-level safety evidence is required, covering BMS protection functions, fault detection, and safe state transitions not addressed by Chinese GB/T 34131.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T 34131 BMS认证不被佛得角接受为IEC 62933-5-2的等效依据。关键环境鉴定差距：（a）盐雾鉴定——预计佛得角大西洋岛屿沿海地点安装的所有BMS和热管理设备均须进行IEC 60068-2-52循环盐雾测试，但中国GB标准未要求；（b）湿热鉴定——预计须在40°C/93% RH条件下进行IEC 60068-2-78稳态湿热测试，以证明BMS电子元器件在佛得角热带沿海湿度下的耐受性；（c）热管理降额——针对25°C标准环境设计的BMS热管理，在佛得角持续20–32°C环境和集装箱户外BESS高太阳辐射条件下，可能无法将安全运行温度范围保持在要求范围内；（d）须提供IEC 62933-5-2系统级安全证据，涵盖BMS保护功能、故障检测和安全状态转换，这些内容未在中国GB/T 34131中涉及。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T 34131 BMS認證不被維德角接受為IEC 62933-5-2的等效依據。關鍵環境鑒定差距：（a）鹽霧鑒定——預計維德角大西洋島嶼沿海地點安裝的所有BMS和熱管理設備均須進行IEC 60068-2-52循環鹽霧測試，但中國GB標準未要求；（b）濕熱鑒定——預計須在40°C/93% RH條件下進行IEC 60068-2-78穩態濕熱測試，以證明BMS電子元器件在維德角熱帶沿海濕度下的耐受性；（c）熱管理降額——針對25°C標準環境設計的BMS熱管理，在維德角持續20–32°C環境和貨櫃戶外BESS高太陽輻射條件下，可能無法將安全運行溫度範圍保持在要求範圍內；（d）須提供IEC 62933-5-2系統級安全證據，涵蓋BMS保護功能、故障檢測和安全狀態轉換，這些內容未在中國GB/T 34131中涉及。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice — IEC 62933-5-2 BMS safety evidence and coastal environmental qualification expected for ARME/ELECTRA project acceptance; IGQPI conformity mark may impose additional pre-import requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 34131-2023 BMS requirements are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not accepted as equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2 in Cape Verde; no tropical coastal or salt-mist environmental qualification required under Chinese GB standards

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 34131 BMS certification does not satisfy IEC 62933-5-2 requirements expected by ARME and ELECTRA for Cape Verde BESS projects. Salt-mist and damp-heat environmental qualification testing per IEC 60068-2-52 and IEC 60068-2-78 is critical for all BMS and thermal management equipment in Cape Verde's coastal island installations. Obtain IEC 62933-5-2 system-level safety evidence and relevant IEC 60068 environmental test reports before shipment. Engage ARME and ELECTRA to confirm project-specific BMS and environmental qualification requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 34131 BMS认证不满足ARME和ELECTRA对佛得角BESS项目所期望的IEC 62933-5-2要求。依据IEC 60068-2-52和IEC 60068-2-78进行的盐雾和湿热环境鉴定测试对佛得角沿海岛屿装置的所有BMS和热管理设备至关重要。出货前取得IEC 62933-5-2系统级安全证据和相关IEC 60068环境测试报告。与ARME和ELECTRA接触，确认项目专属BMS和环境鉴定要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 34131 BMS認證不滿足ARME和ELECTRA對維德角BESS項目所期望的IEC 62933-5-2要求。依據IEC 60068-2-52和IEC 60068-2-78進行的鹽霧和濕熱環境鑒定測試對維德角沿海島嶼裝置的所有BMS和熱管理設備至關重要。出貨前取得IEC 62933-5-2系統級安全證據和相關IEC 60068環境測試報告。與ARME和ELECTRA接觸，確認項目專屬BMS和環境鑒定要求。
